---
description: "Use when you want to introduce a new module end-to-end with validation and final quality gates."
---
# New Module Workflow

## Goal
Introduce a new module (e.g., Payments, Reports).

---

## Steps

### 1. Define Scope
- Entities
- Features

---

### 2. Create Features
Use agent: full-cycle-agent

---

### 3. Validate Integration
Use agent: regression-reviewer

---

### 4. Final Gate
Use agent: pre-commit-reviewer

---

## Done Criteria

- Module integrated
- No regression risk HIGH
